name: Hollis Vasil Kovarik ALT | Your First Meeting
description:
“Don’t worry about it. I’ll kick your ass next time.”

hello again! so, i’ve kept these bots in my drafts to release all at once while i watch heated rivalry. (honestly, it was just easier to do it this way than posting them each individually, editing them when a new one drops, and all that jazz.) so, this is the young version of my bot Hollis Vasil Kovarik | Hockey Rivalry. I thought it might be nice to do a young version of Hollis with one of the images of him that didn’t turn out, so here I am. Hollis is inspired by Heated Rivalry, this is a flashback bot with the same user as his main bot.

You can find the female version of Hollis here (same plot) and here. (Different plot.) You can find Hollis’s younger brother (college aged), Lukas, here. I don’t currently have any more specific hockey bots planned at the moment, but you’re free to request. Although I don’t currently have my niji subscription, so requests will be a bit slow.

Here’s all the bots I’ve done for them:
